message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

rectangle "PDQm Implementation grouped as a façade" {
  rectangle "Patient Demographics Supplier"
  rectangle "Patient Demographics Consumer"
}

rectangle "Patient Demographics Consumer"
rectangle "Patient Demographics Supplier"

note right of "Patient Demographics Consumer" : Mobile Patient Demographics Query [ITI-78]
note left of "Patient Demographics Supplier" : Internal processing
note right of "Patient Demographics Consumer" : Patient Demographics Query [ITI-21] or Patient Demographics Query for HL7v3 [ITI-47]
note left of "Patient Demographics Supplier" : [ITI-21] or [ITI-47] Response
note right of "Patient Demographics Consumer" : Internal processing
note left of "Patient Demographics Consumer" : [ITI-78] Response

activate "Patient Demographics Consumer"
activate "Patient Demographics Supplier"
activate "Patient Demographics Consumer"
activate "Patient Demographics Supplier"

"Patient Demographics Consumer" -> "Patient Demographics Supplier" : Mobile Patient Demographics Query [ITI-78]
"Patient Demographics Supplier" --> "Patient Demographics Consumer" : Internal processing
"Patient Demographics Consumer" -> "Patient Demographics Supplier" : Patient Demographics Query [ITI-21] or Patient Demographics Query for HL7v3 [ITI-47]
"Patient Demographics Supplier" --> "Patient Demographics Consumer" : [ITI-21] or [ITI-47] Response
"Patient Demographics Consumer" --> "Patient Demographics Supplier" : Internal processing
"Patient Demographics Supplier" --> "Patient Demographics Consumer" : [ITI-78] Response

deactivate "Patient Demographics Consumer"
deactivate "Patient Demographics Supplier"
deactivate "Patient Demographics Consumer"
deactivate "Patient Demographics Supplier"

@enduml
